testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_65] Ensure container insights are enabled on ECS cluster
[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_289] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
